CYP DDIs > 30 µM
hERG inhibition patch clamp EC50 > 30 µM
Oral bioavailability all species ~50%
SafetyPharmacology:
Preferential and more rapid degradation of GSPT1 in MYC high tumor cells enables favorable adverse event (AE) profile at clinically active doses of 0.5 and 1 mg – no Grade ≥3 AEs; Grade 1-2 AEs primarily GI-related and manageable.
No observations of previously reported limitations of other GSPT1-targeted agents; No observed clinically significant hypocalcemia or hypotension/cytokine release syndrome at any dose level.
Grade 4 thrombocytopenia identified as dose limiting toxicity (DLT) at 2 mg.
Favorable safety profile with lack of hypocalcemia has enabled exploration of 21/7 schedule; starting at 0.5 mg.
